statement.informal: Existential restatement of the subtraction lower bound: every F16 operator has at least one input pair where it disagrees with subtraction. Useful when downstream consumers need a witness rather than a propositional negation. (over ℂ instead of ℝ)
statement.formal_lean:
theorem no_F_op_equals_sub :
    ∀ op ∈ s_f16_ops, ∃ x y : ℂ, op x y ≠ x - y

tactics:
theorem no_F_op_equals_sub :
    ∀ op ∈ s_f16_ops, ∃ x y : ℂ, op x y ≠ x - y := by
  intro op hmem
  by_contra hall
  push_neg at hall
  exact no_f16_computes_sub op hmem hall

metadata.verification_pending: Phase 1.5 — port legacy theorems to MachLib foundations before kernel re-verification.
